generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, interfacing with the vehicle's motor for autonomous driving control."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls the steering angle of the vehicle, enabling navigation and path-following for autonomous driving operations."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Implements remote command execution to halt the vehicle immediately via motor actuation system, ensuring safety during autonomous operations."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides high-resolution 3D point clouds for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures RGB-D data for environmental perception and object recognition using Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RGBDEnvironmentalData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors the ego vehicle's speed via onboard sensors for real-time state awareness."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSpeedData
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors the ego vehicle's steering angle via onboard sensors for real-time state awareness."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTracking : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR data using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering to generate object tracks (e.g., lead vehicle detection for ACC)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ProcessedObjectTracks
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance RawLiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Transmits raw LiDAR point clouds from the physical vehicle to the digital twin via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi network (UDP/TCP protocols)."
]

instance RGBDEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "Transmits RGB-D environmental data from the physical vehicle to the digital twin via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi network (UDP/TCP protocols)."
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Transmits ego vehicle speed data from the physical vehicle to the digital twin via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi network (UDP/TCP protocols)."
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Transmits ego vehicle steering angle data from the physical vehicle to the digital twin via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi network (UDP/TCP protocols)."
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringAndTracking
    base:desc "Transmits processed object tracks (e.g., lead vehicle) from the physical vehicle to the digital twin via ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi network (UDP/TCP protocols)."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering algorithm for grouping LiDAR point clouds into distinct objects in the vehicle's environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filtering for tracking detected objects (e.g., lead vehicle) over time to maintain consistent object identities."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 standards for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance class I, enabling distance-based speed adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time sensor data including ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and raw LiDAR point clouds for digital twin processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointClouds, EgoVehicleSpeedData, EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks generated from raw LiDAR data using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for ACC decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateLogs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stored timeseries data of vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and detected objects for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeedData, EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData, ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance SimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated sensor data used for AI training and experimentation in the digital twin environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CollectionIdentificationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides intra-entity communication and modular software deployment across the digital twin system using ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)."
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables onboard computation and communication for the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer using Jetpack 5.0 SDK."
]

instance WiFiCommunicationProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Facilitates inter-entity communication between physical twin and digital twin using Wi-Fi network with UDP/TCP protocols, adhering to 100 ms latency requirement."
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supports rapid prototyping for point cloud processing and other digital twin functionalities using Python 3.8."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages ROS2 node lifecycle and other low-level system functionalities using C++."
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implements complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking algorithms using MATLAB/Simulink."
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Pre-processes raw sensor data (e.g., unit conversions, message alignment) for digital twin consumption."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering to generate object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computes Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) parameters (e.g., desired speed) based on processed object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for seamless inter-entity communication."
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores vehicle state logs and processed data in SQL database for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CollectionIdentificationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages simulated data collection for AI training and experimentation purposes."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI. Supports data saving and report generation."
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from the vehicle to the digital twin to reduce computational burden on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, sending commands back for actuation."
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables geographically remote operation of ACC, including enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and issuing emergency braking commands."
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path in real-time via 3D Visualization UI."
]

instance DataReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable reports (e.g., timeseries of object tracks and vehicle state) via Reporting Functional Entity."
]

instance ACCParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts ACC parameters (e.g., desired speed) based on real-time object tracking and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes emergency braking command to halt the vehicle immediately."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Allows operators to adjust ACC parameters remotely (e.g., desired speed)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency commands (e.g., halt vehicle) remotely."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin system for a 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted with autonomy components for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), consisting of a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium base chassis and upper-level autonomy elements including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i camera, and Vedder ESC."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity deployed on the vehicle, hosting autonomy components including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, sensors (LiDAR, camera), and actuation systems (motor, steering)."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwin
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity deployed on external hardware (e.g., cloud/edge servers), hosting functional entities for data processing, computation, and control."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwin
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity deployed on external hardware, providing interfaces for real-time monitoring, remote management, and data visualization."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DT and sent back to the vehicle's **Actuation FE** to adjust motor voltage and maintain safe following distance.
  - **Remote management commands**: Enabled via the **User Entity**, including:
    - **Enable/Disable ACC**: Activates or deactivates the ACC system.
    - **Modify desired speed**: Adjusts the target speed for ACC operation.
    - **Emergency braking**: Sends an immediate halt command to the vehicle's motor actuation system.
  - **Actuation commands**: Transmitted over the **Wi-Fi network** with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185) to ensure real-time responsiveness."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale** with the following constraints:
  - **Data collection and processing**: Occurs at the **perception cycle rate** (e.g., LiDAR and camera data fusion for object tracking).
  - **Control loop**: The ACC system operates with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication), ensuring timely actuation.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices in the DT system are synchronized to an accuracy of **100 ms** to maintain event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations.
  The DT is designed for **continuous, real-time twinning** during vehicle operation, with no explicit mention of batch or offline processing."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts vehicle-specific functionalities (e.g., **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking**, **Actuation**) and interfaces with sensors/actuators.
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Implements core DT logic (e.g., **ACC Controlling FE**, **Data Collection**, **Reporting FE**) and communicates with the Physical Twin Entity and User Entity.
    3. **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** interfaces for monitoring and remote management.
  - **Functional Entities (FEs)**:
    - Mapped to **ROS2 packages** for modularity and distributed execution.
    - **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, message alignment, and unit conversion across entities.
    - **User Interface FE** is split into **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** for specialized user interactions.
  - **Deployment**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the vehicle (Jetson Orin Nano).
    - **Digital Twin Entity** and **User Entity**: Deployed on external hardware (e.g., cloud/edge).
    - Communication between entities occurs over **Wi-Fi** with **100 ms latency** constraints."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin is primarily utilized during the **operation phase** of the vehicle's lifecycle, supporting real-time monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading for ACC. During the **development phase**, the DT serves as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility**, enabling developers to troubleshoot and validate system behavior using real-time data collection and visualization. The twinning does not cover the **as-designed (ideal) or as-manufactured** phases explicitly but focuses on the **as-operated** state, leveraging sensor data and simulation for real-world validation. The system adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The digital twin's fidelity is ensured through real-time synchronization and adherence to **ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I. **Validation mechanisms** include: **(1) Latency Constraints**: Enforced **100 ms maximum end-to-end latency** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**) and **100 ms clock synchronization** for event ordering. **(2) Data Accuracy**: Sensor data (LiDAR, camera) is processed via **DBSCAN and Kalman filtering** for object tracking. **(3) Safety-Critical Validation**: The system respects the **safety-critical nature** of ACC, with human-in-the-loop oversight. No explicit verification methods (e.g., testing against real-world scenarios) are detailed in the document, but the architecture ensures alignment with **ISO 23247** and domain-specific standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin and digital twin involves: **(1) Intra-Entity Communication**: **ROS2 network** for data exchange between software components within an entity. **(2) Inter-Entity Communication**: **Wi-Fi network** for communication between the **Physical Twin Entity** (on-vehicle) and **Digital Twin Entity** (external). **(3) Data Translation**: The **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions for all data streams. The system does not explicitly adopt a **client-server model** but relies on **ROS2 topics** and **Wi-Fi** for distributed communication, with latency and synchronization constraints enforced to meet **3GPP TS 22.185** requirements."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** onboard the vehicle, running **ROS2** and **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (e.g., cloud or edge servers) to offload computation from the vehicle.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted on a **remote workstation** or **web-based interface** for operators and developers to interact with the DT.
  - **Data Storage**: Implemented as an **SQL database** external to the vehicle to handle large quantities of real-time data.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** is used for intra-entity communication, while **Wi-Fi** is used for inter-entity communication with latency constraints."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is not explicitly detailed in the document for this specific digital twin system. The system focuses on **internal data flows** between its entities and does not describe integration with external systems like fleet management or traffic management platforms. However, the architecture enforces a **standardized communication interface** (via **Data Translation FE**) and **ROS2/Wi-Fi protocols**, which could theoretically support future integrations. The abstract mentions **cloud-based fleet coordination** as a general industry need, but this is not implemented in the case study."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Used as the **reference architecture** for DT development, adapted for automotive applications by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** and splitting the **User Interface FE**.
  - **ISO 15622**: Implements **performance class I ACC** requirements for the control strategy and functionality.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Specifies **100 ms end-to-end latency** for V2V communication, ensuring real-time responsiveness.
  - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: Used as the **middleware** for intra-entity communication, enabling modular and distributed software deployment.
  - **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0**: Provides the **SDK** for developing software on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**.
  The DT also leverages **community best practices** (e.g., ROS2 packaging) and **case-based generalization** from automotive projects."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The digital twin system prioritizes safety and security through: **(1) Safety-Critical Design**: Enforces **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization** to ensure real-time responsiveness and event ordering. **(2) Human-in-the-Loop**: Classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**, ensuring operator oversight for critical operations. **(3) Latency Constraints**: Adheres to **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication to prevent unsafe delays. The document does not explicitly detail **cybersecurity measures** (e.g., authentication, encryption) but emphasizes the **safety-critical nature** of the system. Remote operations (e.g., emergency braking) are designed to be **time-sensitive and synchronized**, reducing risks of accidents."
]
